title: Enhanced Sanctions Screening
description: Screen all client and counterparty payments against updated global sanctions lists in near-real-time, with secondary review of every potential match within 24 hours.

title: Client Data Retention Limits
description: Delete or anonymise personal client data within 24 months of account closure unless an active legal hold applies.

title: Performance Advertising Disclosures
description: All advertised performance figures must present net-of-fees returns over standardised time periods with the prescribed disclosures.

title: Best Execution Monitoring
description: Maintain quarterly best-execution reviews across all venues with documented rationale for venue selection.

title: T+1 Trade Reporting
description: Report all eligible securities transactions to the regulator by end of trade date plus one (T+1).
